title: bounded fixed-capacity arena push/get
statement: From docs/basket/spec-arena.md. Define `struct Arena { mem: [8]i64, count: u32 }` and two functions: `fn push(ar: write Arena, x: i64) -> bool` (append if `count < 8`, returning whether it was stored; capacity spent is a value, not a fault) and `fn get(ar: read Arena, i: u32) -> i64` (copy element `i` out). Write-path derefs are explicit (`ar.*.count`); read-path auto-derefs. Define only these items.
